title: Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty and comforting beef stew with a kick of heat, inspired by Irish cuisine.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add Irish Stew Seasoning and red pepper flakes to pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add flour to pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add beef broth and red wine to pot, whisking until smooth.
Return beef to pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours, or until beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
